ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 861-867 VERMONT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSN. AS TO DEFENDANT CARL ERNST TRUSTEE, ERNST PVT. TRUST LLC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,267.00 FILED BY 861-867 VERMONT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSN. AS TO DEFENDANT CARL ERNST TRUSTEE, ERNST PVT. TRUST LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF 861-867 VERMONT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY MICHAEL KERMMITT, TREASURER. DEFENDANT CARL ERNST TRUSTEE PRESENT ON BEHALF OF THE ERNST PVT, TRUST LLC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED DEC-16-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARL ERNST TRUSTEE, ERNST PVT. TRUST LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 861-867 VERMONT STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSN. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARL ERNST TRUSTEE, ERNST PVT. TRUST LLC. $3,267.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,357.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED IN FULL. AS TO DEFENDANT CARL ERNST TRUSTEE, ERNST PVT. TRUST LLC.
